description: Lists files and directories in a given directory with optional recursion, glob filtering, and result limit.

path.description: Directory path to list. Relative paths are resolved from VFS worktree root; absolute paths are resolved from host filesystem root and must be allowed by VFS access rules.

recursive.description: Whether to list recursively in subdirectories.

pattern.description: Glob pattern used to filter results by name/path (e.g., "*.go", "**/*.md").

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Use 0 or omit for no limit.
